description.zh-Hans: 生成具有错列石板、可选横向合并、硬边砂浆、左上亮边、右下暗边和稀疏裂纹的RPG石板地面。
description.en: Generates RPG flagstone floors with staggered slabs, optional horizontal merges, crisp mortar, directional bevels, and sparse cracks.

triggers.zh-Hans: 石板, 石板路, 铺路石, 石块路面, 室外地面
triggers.en: flagstone, paving stone, stone slab, patio, walkway

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成石板铺装纹理，用于庭院、广场或室外场景的地面。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a flagstone paving texture for courtyards, plazas, or outdoor scene grounds.
